currentStats.source: ESPN scoreboard updater refreshed completed group results, match count, and goals through 2026-06-26. Attendance, top-scorer, and conduct snapshots are not refreshed by this automated score pass.
currentStats.thirdPlaceTableSource: Prior conduct/fair-play notes only; not refreshed by automated scoreboard updater after score totals advanced.

conductScores.note: Known team conduct/fair-play score in current third-place table note.
Known team conduct/fair-play score in current third-place table note.

currentStats.attendanceSource: Not refreshed by automated scoreboard updater after score totals advanced.
currentStats.topScorersSource: Not refreshed by automated scoreboard updater after score totals advanced.

fixtures.source: embedded schedule; automated pass cross-matches scoreboard events by teams but does not overwrite venue/kickoff fields without an unambiguous source adapter

automation.schedule: GitHub Actions runs at 11:37 UTC and 17:37 UTC with workflow_dispatch fallback; America/Montreal local time shifts with DST because cron is UTC.

dataQuality.principle: Missing factors remain neutral; stale or conflicting factors must lower confidence rather than force precision.

principle: Failed or missing sources degrade to neutral inputs unless validated data is available.
